description:
Competitor List:
1. Sebastian Kling

3. Oskar Herzog
4. Jannis Jäckel
5. Chokshith Haviraj
6. Tanmay Naduvattira
7. Larissa Reinke

Registration / Anmeldung:

January 2, 2024 – July 10, 2024
Registration via email to the organizer. Enter your WCA ID and indicate which events you would like to attend. If you do NOT have a WCA ID, provide your full name, a country of which you are a citizen.
If you are a registered competitor, you may change your registered events by email until June 17, 2024.
No registrations will be accepted on site.
Every spectator has free entry

2. Januar 2024 – 10. Juli 2024
Anmeldung per E-Mail an den Organisatoren. Geben Sie Ihre WCA-ID ein und geben Sie an, an welchen Events Sie teilnehmen möchten. Wenn Sie KEINEN WCA-ID haben, geben Sie Ihren vollständigen Namen, ein Land, dessen Staatsbürgerschaft Sie haben.
Wenn Sie ein registrierter Teilnehmer sind, können Sie Ihre registrierten Events bis zum 17. Juni 2024 per E-Mail ändern.
Es werden keine Anmeldungen vor Ort entgegengenommen.
Jeder Zuschauer hat freien Eintritt.

name: ZSO 2 Cubing 2024
description:
Zapraszamy na zawody ZSO 2 w speedcubingu! Jeżeli jesteś z Osowej i potrafisz ułożyć kostkę Rubika poniżej 2 minut, to są to zawody dla ciebie:) Rejestracja jest możliwa drogą mailową. Należy podać Imię, Nazwisko oraz średni wynik w 3x3x3 w formacie MM:SS (prosimy o podawanie rezultatów realnych do osiągnięcia przez zawodnika).
Koniec rejestracji 29.02.2024.
*Harmonogram podany przed końcem rejestracji jest orientacyjny
Pula nagród rzeczowych:
150PLN

name: Rüppurrer Open 2024
description:
Hinweis: Die Ergebnisse der zweiten Runde des 3x3 gehören nicht zu Cubing Contests und werden auf einer anderen Seite durchgeführt.

Willkommen bei den Rüppurr Open 2024!  
Dieser Wettbewerb enthält eine besondere zweite Runde des 3x3-Wettbewerbs. Die erste Runde dient zur Setzung der Teilnehmer, während die zweite Runde als 1-gegen-1-Doppel-K.O.-Turnier ausgetragen wird. Die Teilnehmer treten im Best-of-5-Format (Bo5) gegeneinander an. Die meisten WCA- und CubingContest-Regeln gelten weiterhin, ergänzt durch folgende Bestimmungen:

Der Judge wird "Inspection" ansagen, um die 15-sekündige Inspektionsphase einzuleiten. Beide Teilnehmer sollen dann ihre Abdeckungen vom Würfel heben und mit der Inspektion beginnen. Bei 8 Sekunden kündigt der Judge „8 Sekunden“ an. Bei 12 Sekunden startet der Judge einen Countdown von 3 Sekunden (3, 2, 1, GO). Bei „GO“ müssen beide Teilnehmer ihre Hände vom Stackmat genommen haben und mit dem Lösen beginnen.

Der Teilnehmer, der zuerst fertig ist, erhält einen Punkt in diesem Match. Wenn ein Teilnehmer nach „GO“ nicht mit dem Lösen beginnt, wird ihm eine Strafe von +2 Sekunden auferlegt. Beginnt der Teilnehmer nicht, bevor die Stoppuhr des Schiedsrichters 17 Sekunden erreicht, wird das Ergebnis als DNF gewertet, und er verliert diesen Versuch.

Bei einem Unentschieden wird ein weiteres Lösen durchgeführt, um den Sieger zu ermitteln.

Beachte dass wir höchstwahrscheinlich vor 17:00 Uhr fertig sein werden.

venue: UNC Charlotte College of Health and Human Services Room 109
description:
## UNC Charlotte Niner Speedcubing Competition

This is an unofficial competition hosted by UNC Charlotte's Niner Speedcubing club. This competition is open to everyone even if you're not a UNC Charlotte student.

**Registration Details**
- **Link:** [Registration Form](https://forms.gle/5LdKuGkPQLtXhh4C6)
- Registration is free and will open from Wednesday, December 4, 2024, at 7:00 PM to December 11, 2024.
- If the number of competitors exceeds 20, registrants will be placed on a waiting list. Registrants on the waiting list may be accepted if a spot opens up until December 11, 2024, at 7:00 PM.

**University Policy**
- Minors are required to be accompanied by an adult per University policy.

**Competition Rules**
- This competition will adhere to the [WCA Regulations and Guidelines](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/full/) and [CC rules](https://cubingcontests.com/rules).
- 3x3 Finals will be head-to-head if time permits.
- If you require any accessibility needs or other accommodations, please email us: andlamb2002@gmail.com.

**Stay Connected**

name: Sydney's in a Rush 2024
description:
For this competition, we encourage competitors to be a part of the NSW Cubers Discord Server. If you wish to participate in this competition, please contact the email to register and we will add you to the server which will give additional details about the day. If you are under the age of 13, we will find another way to send you the info.

To register for this competition, please go to the contact section and send an email titled "Sydney's In a Rush 2024", specifying your name, WCA ID if you have one, as well as your chosen events. Your registration will not be accepted if the comp fills and you will not receive a confirmation email confirming any further details.

name: Thessaloniki Winter Open 2024

This is the last Cubing Contests competition in northern Greece for 2024. We are happy to announce that in this competition we will have a new event: Clock Doubles. In this competition we will also have a special event: Linear Fewest Moves. Linear Fewest Moves is done in a much different way than the other events and therefore the competitor limit for it is 6.

To register fill out [this Google form](https://forms.gle/yeiyjUUf3HMPH39FA)

If for some reason you end up not being able to come or want to make a change in the events you are competing in please send us an email to let us know.

- Teilnehmerlimit: 7/7

  2. Gib die Competition-ID ein: WhatTimeIsItRueppurr2025.

     - WCA-ID (falls vorhanden)

Hinweise:  
- Wenn das Teilnehmerlimit erreicht ist, kommst du auf die Warteliste.  
- Bei Absagen vor dem 25. Januar rückt die nächste Person nach.  

3x3 Supersolve:  
Am 26. Januar werden die Scrambles für den 3x3 Supersolve per E-Mail an alle Teilnehmer gesendet.

**English**

Event Details:  
- Date: 02.02.2025  
- Competitor Limit: 7/7  
- Main Event: Clock  

Registration:  
- Opens: January 11, 2025, at 18:00  
- How to register:  
  1. Visit [cubingtools.de/competitions](https://cubingtools.de/competitions).  
  2. Enter the competition ID: WhatTimeIsItRueppurr2025.  
  3. Fill out the form with:  
     - Your full name  
     - Email address  
     - WCA ID (if available)  
     - Events you want to participate in  

Notes:  
- If the limit is reached, you’ll be put on a waiting list.  
- If someone cancels before January 25, the next person on the list will get a spot.

name: Mira Labs Cube Mile Bacolod 2025
address: Capitol Park and Lagoon, Bacolod City, Negros Occidental
description:
🌟 Witness History in the Making! 🌟

🏃‍♂️🧩 Mira Labs 3x3 Cube Mile 🧩🏃‍♀️
The FIRST official 3x3 Cube Mile event in the Philippines is here! Your results will be recorded here on Cubing Contests, the premier platform for unofficial cubing event records.

📅 Date: January 19, 2025 (Philippine Time)
📍 Location: Capitol Park and Lagoon, Bacolod City
⏰ Time: 5:00 AM - 9:00 AM

🔥 Event Rules:

3x3x3 Cube Mile (see the [rules page](https://cubingcontests.com/rules) for more information)

- Solve 4 scrambled 3x3 cubes and run 4 laps (1609m total) in this order: Solve ➡ Lap ➡ Solve ➡ Lap ➡ Solve ➡ Lap ➡ Solve ➡ Final Lap to the Finish Line.
- No inspection time before solving.
- Scrambling follows the 3x3 Multi-Blind rules (unique scramble per puzzle).
- A +2 penalty applies for a cube being one move away, and DNF if unsolved.
- Timing is recorded by an official judge with a stopwatch.

Be Part of a Cubing Milestone!
Join the Mira Labs 3x3 Cube Mile and experience the thrill of combining speedcubing with athleticism. Are you ready to test your skills, endurance, and strategy in one of the most innovative cubing events ever?

📌 Save the date and be there to witness or compete!

#MiraLabsCubeMile

name: Caringbah Cubers Meetup #1 2025
description:
For this meetup we encourage competitors to be a part of the NSW Cubers Discord Server. If you wish to participate in this meetup, please contact the email to register and we will add you to the server which will give additional details about the day. If you are under the age of 13, we will find another way to send you the information.

To register for this meetup, please go to the contact section and send an email titled "Caringbah Cubers Meetup #1", specifying your full name, WCA ID if you have one, as well as your chosen events. Your registration will not be accepted if the meetup fills and you will not receive a confirmation email confirming any further details. You will receive further information about the meetup the day before including the group allocations as well as other important notes.

name: Davis Year End Comp 2025
description:
End of year comp for the Davis Cube Club. Anyone is welcome to attend. There will be on the spot registration for all events. To compete in an event show up 15 minutes before the schedule start so we can make scorecards and groups. 

For the Timer Stop event, your goal is to stop the timer at exactly 7.777 seconds. The winner is the person with the closest average of 5 attempts to 7.777. If you get a time of 6.25 you automatically win!

Join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/paCePZXJW8) for up-to-date information or if you have any questions.

Pasos de Roux: 2x2x1, 1er bloque, 2do 2x2x1, 2do bloque, CMLL, EOLR, 4C.

name: Caringbah Cubers Meetup #2 2025
description:
For this meetup we encourage competitors to be a part of the NSW Cubers Discord Server. If you wish to participate in this meetup, please contact the email to register and we will add you to the server which will give additional details about the day. If you are under the age of 13, we will find another way to send you the information.

To register for this meetup, please go to the contact section and send an email titled "Caringbah Cubers Meetup #2", specifying your full name, WCA ID if you have one, as well as your chosen events. Your registration will not be accepted if the meetup fills and you will not receive a confirmation email confirming any further details. You will receive further information about the meetup the day before including the group allocations as well as other important notes.

name: Davis Summer 2025
description:
This competition will be debuting a new unoffical event, One Move Team Factory!

The live results of this event will be available through the Cubing Contests Website and will be added to the event ranking after the competition.

Rules:

As a team of two, solve a 3x3x3 one move at a time, alternating team members between each move. Only one team member may make a move at a time. No talking is allowed at any point during the attempt (this includes inspection). A competitor may not undo their own move and turn a separate layer on the same turn (e.g. R R' U isn't allowed, but R R2 is).

Registration:

To register for this event, please fill out the [registration form](https://forms.gle/UmrAJ9Nmc3Vd4KBm7) by Thursday, July 24, 2025 at 7:00 PM PDT. Please fill out the form only once for you and your teammate. You may only compete on one team.

description:
Unofficial events meetup after Day 1 of the 2025 Great Lakes Championship, in the main lobby of the hotel.

Sign-up form: [here](https://forms.gle/UhGVz4J2ysvz2xoKA)

**PLEASE BRING A TIMER AND STACKMAT IF YOU HAVE ONE!!!!**

After FMC Attempt 3 ends, we will move to the main lobby and competitors will then be split into two groups. Competitors assigned to Group 1 will do their solves for all their events (in any order they wish, although an entire average must be completed before moving onto another event), while competitors in Group 2 will be assigned with running, judging, and scrambling. After all competitors in Group 1 are done solving, those in Group 2 will do their solves while those in Group 1 will help out. Please do not hog the stations to do all events at once, and allow other competitors to complete their averages.

name: Mid-Atlantic FTO Meetup 2025
description:
Join us in the lobby of the Hilton Garden Inn Valley Forge/Oaks hotel at 7:45 p.m. for a round of Face-Turning Octahedron, Corner-Turning Octahedron, and Baby FTO! This will be held after Skewb round 1. This **will not** serve as the Mid-Atlantic Championship for FTO, as this has happened already, but we will be recognizing the Pennsylvania champion in FTO, and the Mid-Atlantic and Pennsylvania champion in Baby FTO and Corner-Turning Octahedron! There will be a top 8 final of Face-Turning Octahedron if enough competitors compete.

We will be allowing on-the-spot registration!

name: Rubik's Irish Championship 2025
address: South East Technological University West Campus, Carriganore, Co. Waterford. X91 XD96
description:
Once again Irish Championship 2025 will feature Team-Blind on the Saturday evening. This year there will be an unexpected twist, which you will find out more about on the day. 

The Cuber and Non-Cuber category will be running before the Cuber and Cuber category. A non-cuber must be someone who has never competed at a competition (this includes Irish Championship 2025). The Non-Cuber category includes people such as siblings and parents, and is intended to allow an opportunity for people less involved in cubing to join in the fun! The awards will be the same for both categories, and both members of each team will receive an award.

name: Colombian Nationals Eje Cafetero 2025
description:
Inscripciones: desde el 11 de agosto y hasta el 3 de noviembre, con clasificación tipo All-Stars:
-  Durante este tiempo estará disponible en la pestaña de «Categorías No Oficiales / Unofficial Events» el enlace a la lista del top de competidores registrados.
-  La aprobación se hará después del cierre de inscripciones, seleccionando el top 40 de cada categoría (en Team-Blind se tomará el integrante mejor ranqueado).
-  Competidores sin ranking en CubingContests.com: prioridad por orden de inscripción.

Fechas clave:
-  Entre el 4 y el 9 de noviembre: se notificará por correo electrónico a los competidores seleccionados.
-  hasta el 13 de noviembre 7:00 p.m.:  plazo máximo para confirmar su cupo; por favor confirmen tan pronto como reciban la aprobación para que podamos notificar a otros competidores en consecuencia.
-  14 de noviembre: Estado final de la incripción (aprobada o rechazada).

name: Encuentro Cubero Coffee Cubers II 2025
description:
¡Bienvenid@ al segundo encuentro cubero del 2025 en el Eje Cafetero!

Hoy podrás conocer el nuevo y mejor espacio que tendremos para torneos de FMC y encuentros cuberos: Top Deck TCGs 🔥

Las categorías de este torneo serán 2 de las que estarán presentes en el Torneo Colombian Nationals Eje Cafetero 2025 y tu participación servirá para el ranking que decidirá quienes clasifican para competir en el torneo más grande del año en Colombia.

Muchas gracias a Top Deck por el apoyo y el espacio, gracias a ustedes ahora los cuberos del Eje Cafetero tendrán un excelente espacio para practicar y volverse más competitivos en este hermoso deporte.

name: FMC Ménival 2025
description:
Pour les personnes ne participant pas au FMC, vous avez la possibilité de participer à l'épreuve du 3x3x3 supersolve. Vous aurez une heure par essai pour préparer votre solution avant de passer.

name: Davis Fall 2025
description:
This competition will be holding two unofficial events: 8 puzzle and Team Blind!

Unofficial events will be held in the venue lobby. There is no registration for unofficial events. 

To compete, show up to the unofficial events area when you are free. Please come early in the case of a line. You will need to bring a judge for your solves. Any competitor or parents can help judge. A staff member will be present to answer any question and provide scrambles.
 
## 8 Puzzle

We will provide sliding 8 puzzles for competitors who are interested in competing. 

We recommend all competitors to learn how to solve the 8 puzzle. It is beginner friendly and intuitive. We are glad to answer any questions.

**Format:**
Average of 5 solves
Time Limit: 2:00.00
Cutoff: 45.00

## 3x3x3 Team-Blind

Solve a 3x3x3 as a team with a solver who is blindfolded, and a caller who is not allowed to touch the cube or the solver's arms below the elbow. There is no inspection time.

**Format:**
Average of 5 solves
Time Limit: 4:00.00
Cutoff: 2:00.00

name: 3x3 Cube 1000! 2025
description:
## French

Ce meetup est une mini comp qui ressemble plus à une RIC qu'autre chose :)
Si vous aimez courir et cuber, cette comp est faite pour vous.
Ce meetup est sans inscription, mais si vous avez l'intention de venir envoyez un mail à romain.velcin@gmail.com avec votre nom, prénom, ID WCA si vous en avez un et votre niveau approximatif au 3x3.
L'épreuve 3x3 cube mile consiste à résoudre un cube puis courir un tour de terrain de 400m, 4 fois d'affilée. Vous pourrez participer au 8x8 pendant que les autres passent.
Rendez-vous vers 11:30 vers l'entrée.
Prenez de quoi vous hydrater! (et aussi à manger si vous ne l'avez pas déjà fait)

## English

This meetup is a mini comp that's more like a meetup beetween cubers than anything else :)
If you enjoy running and solving cubes, this competition is for you!
This meetup doesn't require registration, but if you plan to come, send an email to romain.velcin@gmail.com with your first and last name, WCA ID (if you have one), and your approximate level on 3x3.
The 3x3 cube mile event consists of running a 400m lap and then solving a cube, four times in a row. You can participate in the 8x8 event while others are solving.
See you around 11:30 AM near the entrance.
Bring something to drink! (and to eat if you haven't already done so)

name: Events Cocasses 2026
description:
Si vous souhaitez participer à cette compétition, envoyer un mail à romain.velcin@gmail.com avec:
- Votre nom/prénom
- ID WCA (si vous en avez un)
- Events où vous voulez participer
- Events où vous ne participez pas que vous savez mélanger (VOUS DEVEZ SAVOIR MÉLANGER LES EVENTS AUXQUELS VOUS PARTICIPEZ)

Pour les courageux participant au 4x4 FM, l'essai commence à 8H10 DERNIER CARAT, je vous conseille de venir pour 8 heures. Cependant n'arrivez pas avant 7h40, je dormirais probablement encore :). Pour les autres vous pouvez arriver à partir de 9h45, ou 15 min avant votre 1ère épreuve.

APPORTEZ VOS TIMERS, MATS, CUBE CONNECTÉS ET CUBE COVER (clock cover si vous avez).

Attention, les places sont limitées (8), cependant si vous venez qu'à un seul moment de la journée, par exemple que pour le 4x4 FM, ou que pendant une partie de la journée, votre place peut ne pas compter (mais envoyer quand même un mail!).

Le planning est extrêmement chargé, je vous demande donc de faire TOUTES les tâches qui vous sont attribués, et de juger même les rounds auxquels vous ne participez pas. En fin de journée il y aura quelques finales, NE PARTEZ PAS et aidez à staffer les finales. C'est pas très long et c'est très sympa (et si vous voulez pas staffer, entrainez vous aux events pour vous qualifier :) ).
Apportez votre pique-nique pour le midi. Le goûter est fourni (gâteau préparé par moi-même :) ). 

Précisions sur certains events:
- Le clock blind est en best of 5, pas en average of 5 (contrairement à ce qui est marqué)
- Le magic, master magic et snake suivent les règles WCA du magic: le compétiteur peut s'entrainer autant qu'il veut, et quand lui et son juge sont mutuellement d'accord, les 5 prochaines résolutions sont considérées comme officielles.
- Les events qui se déroulent en même temps ont des time limites cumulatives communes (comme pour le 6x6/7x7 dans les vraies compétitions).
- Les time limit/cutoff pourront changer en fonction de l'avance ou du retard que l'on aura.
- Pour le 3x3 blind OH, la mémorisation doit aussi s'effectuer à une main.
- Pour le void cube, vous devez passez avec un vrai void cube, pas juste un 3x3 où vous avez retiré les centres.
- Vous pouvez retrouver les règles plus en détail dans l'onglet "Rules" de Cubing Contest.

Mélanges pour le 3x3 supersolve:
 1) R' U' F R U R' U L F' U2 F R' U' F2 R2 D2 F2 R F2 R2 L D2 B2 R' U' F
 2) R' U' F U R U' L' D2 U' B2 D' L2 R2 F2 U' F' R2 F2 L' D L D' R' U' F
 3) R' U' F L2 D' U2 L2 B2 D2 B' L2 B' R2 D2 F2 R' D2 B R F2 L2 R B2 R' U' F

name: Encuentro Comicfest X Coffee Cubers 2026
description:
# ![](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/rails/active_storage/blobs/redirect/eyJfcmFpbHMiOnsiZGF0YSI6MTU1ODc4LCJwdXIiOiJibG9iX2lkIn19--18060881a66047ac835561d05342fd047ac3d212/1.png) Español

📍 El Comicfest se realizará en la antigua **La 14** , justo cruzando la calle desde el Terminal de Transportes de Pereira.
🕥 Horario: **10:30 a. m. a 7:30 p. m.**

🎟️ Importante:
* Todos los que se inscriban para participar en este encuentro cubero tendrán entrada **completamente gratuita** al recinto. 
* Todo acompañante que no vaya a participar del encuentro **deberá pagar su entrada al Comicfest, cuyo valor es de $20.000 pesos**.

📅 **Sábado 14 de marzo**
*Encuentro Cubero (todo el día)*
Desde la apertura hasta el cierre será un encuentro cubero abierto.
Contaremos con un espacio tipo torneo oficial para:
* Compartir experiencias entre cuberos más y menos experimentados
* Competir en categorías no oficiales por CubingContests (se definirán entre todos en el grupo de cuberos de la comunidad) 
* Seguir fortaleciendo la comunidad 🙌
